meaning: vt.鍑忚交,瑙ｉ櫎,鎻存晳,鏁戞祹,鎹㈢彮
examples: The doctor drew off some fluid to relieve the pressure.
Drugs can relieve much of the pain.
I had to relieve myself behind a bush.
But where does your broadband contract relieve you of responsibilities to the community at large?
The stem of Ephedra, for example, was used to relieve asthma symptoms, coughs, colds and allergies.
